decoupling: Graphs store node and edge state only.
Predictions MUST reference graph nodes by stable node_id.
Patterns MUST be reusable and independent from any one graph.
Workflows MUST consume canonical IDs from authoritative registries.
Dependency maps MUST be machine-enforceable and reflect actual imports/exports.
id_policy: All stable IDs MUST exist in an authoritative record.
Narrative clusters are first-class modules, not free-form labels.
Overlay IDs (X-*, R-*, T-*) are first-class modules, not ad hoc graph strings.
Seeded claim IDs MUST exist in claim_registry.json before they appear in workflow examples.

module_families.purpose: daily scoring sheets and seeded examples
